'''pakasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wabbit|wabbit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wabbit|wabbit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pakasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækæsæth|pækæsæth]] || [[word:pækæsæj|pækæsæj]] || [[word:pækæsæsh|pækæsæsh]] || [[word:pækæsæ|pækæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakakasath|pakakasath]] || [[word:pakakasaj|pakakasaj]] || [[word:pakakasash|pakakasash]] || [[word:pakakasa|pakakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakasath|pakasath]] || [[word:pakasaj|pakasaj]] || [[word:pakasash|pakasash]] || [[word:pakasa|pakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakafsath|pakafsath]] || [[word:pakafsaj|pakafsaj]] || [[word:pakafsash|pakafsash]] || [[word:pakafsaf|pakafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakasatha|pakasatha]] || [[word:pakasaja|pakasaja]] || [[word:pakasasha|pakasasha]] || [[word:pakasaka|pakasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakasath|pakasath]] || [[word:pakasaj|pakasaj]] || [[word:pakasash|pakasash]] || [[word:pakasa|pakasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakasathal|pakasathal]] || [[word:pakasajal|pakasajal]] || [[word:pakasashal|pakasashal]] || [[word:pakasakal|pakasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakasathatha|pakasathatha]] || [[word:pakasajaja|pakasajaja]] || [[word:pakasashasha|pakasashasha]] || [[word:pakasaka|pakasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakasathan|pakasathan]] || [[word:pakasajan|pakasajan]] || [[word:pakasashan|pakasashan]] || [[word:pakasakan|pakasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakasathaoro|pakasathaoro]] || [[word:pakasajaoro|pakasajaoro]] || [[word:pakasashaoro|pakasashaoro]] || [[word:pakasakaoro|pakasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
